author: deepak.rao
message: chore: switch access logs to structured fields in frontend
diff:
@@ services/frontend/gateway/logging.go: func logRequest(r *http.Request, status int, took time.Duration) {
-	log.Printf("%s %s %d %s", r.Method, r.URL.Path, status, took)
+	logger.Info("handled request",
+		"method", r.Method,
+		"route", r.URL.Path,
+		"status", status,
+		"took_ms", took.Milliseconds(),
+	)
 }
